mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 4.5%, tight labor market conditions accelerate wage growth, compressing corporate profit margins and triggering negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the cross-sectional IC drops below 0.02 over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production growth combined with rising residential housing starts signals robust aggregate demand outpacing supply constraints, driving earnings revisions upward and positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict returns with Rank IC > 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window, or out-of-sample Sharpe ratio drops below 0.2.

mechanism_narrative: In a rising rate environment, accelerating core inflation erodes real yields and forces the Fed to tighten further, compressing equity multiples and generating negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive or neutral in > 50% of triggered instances, or the interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Sequential quarterly growth in real GDP directly reflects expanding corporate revenue streams, leading to positive earnings revisions and positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in growth quarters are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When total nonfarm payrolls exceed 200,000 new jobs per month for three consecutive months, sustained labor demand validates corporate pricing power, driving positive equity returns over a weekly horizon.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the positive signal, or the predictive power vanishes after controlling for market beta.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real estate financing activity coupled with stable short-term rates indicates healthy credit expansion supporting consumer spending, which translates to positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict returns with Rank IC > 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window, or out-of-sample Sharpe ratio drops below 0.2.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of constrained industrial output growth, any acceleration in housing starts creates a supply-demand imbalance that boosts commodity-linked equities and drives positive S&P 500 returns over a weekly horizon.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain negative or neutral in > 50% of triggered instances, or the interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression.
